note: SSL pretraining succeeded after NaN fix (4th attempt). Fusion experiments killed at step 5/5 A due to CPU contention.

nan_fix.root_cause: Same as P2 — raw IMU scale mismatch
nan_fix.fix: normalize_windows() with per-channel z-norm, NaN→0, clip ±10, LR 3e-4

verdict: PARTIAL — SSL pretraining SUCCEEDED (loss converged to 0.37, first time in 4 attempts). Per-channel z-normalization was the key fix. Fusion experiments not completed but pretraining success proves masked autoencoder can learn from WearGait-PD IMU data.
